titleStmt.title: SII 22.174: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 174. (A.R. No. 174 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME GŌPURA, LEFT OF ENTRANCE. ACHYUTADĒVA-MAHĀRĀJA—ŚAKA 1457.

summary.p: The details of date are Manmatha, Mithuna, śu. 3, Thursday, Maghā (A.D. 1535; June 3, the nakshatra was however Punarvasu).

This records an endowment of the village Śīyamaṅgalam for worship and other requirements to god Bhōgīśuramuḍaiya-Tambirānār in the temple of Ūrbāgaṅkoṇḍaruḷiya-Nāyanar at Iṟaivānaraiyūr by Bhōgaiyadēva-Mahārāja under the orders of Salakayya Tirumalaiyadēva-Mahārāja for the merit of the king. Bhōgaiyadēva is given the titles Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara, Chōḷakula-tilaka and Uṟaiyūrpuravarādhīśvara. Salakam Tirumala is known to have been a brother-in-law of the king and his chief general.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti . śrīmaṉmahāmaṇṭaleśvara rājātirāja parameśvara śrīyiśvara narasiṅ
hadevakumāra śrī virappiṟatāpa śrīmatu Accutayadevamahārāyar piṟutivirāc
ciyampaṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 7- yitaṉ melccellāniṉṟa
maṉmatasamvatsarattu mitunanāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu tritiyaiyum brahaspati
vāramum peṟṟa maka nakṣattiṟattunāḷ śrīmaṉ mahāmaṇṭaleśvara tummaḷa kovvaśava caṅ
kara calakkaiyadevamahārāja kumāra śrī tirumalaiyadevamahārājā śrī Accut taiyadeva
mahārāyaṟkup puṇṇiyamāka śrīmaṉ mahāmaṇṭaleśvara coḷakulatilata Uṟaiyūr puravarādhiśvara
tippayadevamahārāja kumārar śrīmaṟ pokaiyadevamahārājā tirumalaiyadeva mahārājā
viṉ Appiṇaippaṭikku malāṭākiya jananātavaḷanāṭṭup pānūṟkūṟṟattu brahmade
cam Iṟaivānaraiyūrāna śrīcoḷakeraḷacaturvedimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār pokicuramu
ṭaiyatampirānāṟku tiruppaṇi mahāpūcai Aṅkaraṅka vaipokaṅkaḷukkum muṉ
piṭākaippaṟṟāna ciyamaṅkalam kiṟāmam Oṉṟu Inta kiṟāmam Oṉṟum naṉcey puṉcey nāṟ
pāṟkellaiyum Aṭṭapokatejasvāmyaṅkaḷum dhārā pūrvamāka pa
ṇṇikkuṭuttom Inta nayiṉār Ūrpākamkoṇṭaruḷiya nayināṟkum Uṭaiyār
pokicuramuṭaiya nayināṟkkum Inta kiṟāmam ciyamaṅkalam tevatānammākac cantirātitta
varaiyum naṭakkakaṭavatākavum Inta taṉmattukku yātoruvar Ahitam paṇṇinavarkaḷ
gaṅgaikkaraiyil kobrāhmaṇaraik koṉṟa pāvattile pokakkaṭavarākavum
Ivai cavuntarapāṇṭiya malaiya ṉayiṉār Eḻuttu Ivai koṅka rāyar cempuṉātar Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.174 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
